Hero.label: Up to 400% More Interest with Reels
Hero.subheadline: Well-crafted reels bring more attention, more inquiries, and real buyer interest to listings. Agents using video see up to 400% better results. The first test reel is free.

Services.label: What We Do
Services.title: Photos show. Reels stop the scroll.
Services.subtitle: If listings need more views and more inquiries, we create fast, clean, high-performing content at a fraction of typical costs.
Services.service1Desc: Short-form vertical videos for listings — optimized for Instagram, TikTok, and Facebook. Built to capture attention quickly and present properties in a modern way.
Services.service2Desc: Clean, ready-to-post designs with pricing, details, and branding. Perfect alongside reels for a consistent look.
Services.service3Desc: Send the content. We create the reel. You post it. No calls, no meetings, no complicated workflow.

VideoShowcase.label: Work
VideoShowcase.title: Reels that stops scrolling.
VideoShowcase.subtitle: Real estate content designed to capture attention and increase interest in listings. with up to 400%

HowItWorks.label: How It Works
HowItWorks.title: 3 Simple Steps
HowItWorks.subtitle: Fast process, quick turnaround, and ready-to-post content.
HowItWorks.step1Desc: Photos, videos, price, location — whatever is available can be used.
HowItWorks.step2Desc: Listings are turned into clean, modern reels that highlight the property.
HowItWorks.step3Desc: Receive ready-to-post content that makes listings more engaging and attention-grabbing.

Testimonials.label: Testimonials
Testimonials.title: What Agents Say
Testimonials.t1Quote: Fast, simple, and great results. Listings looked much better in video than just photos.
Testimonials.t2Quote: Exactly what was needed — affordable reels with fast delivery. The process was simple and the result was strong.
Testimonials.t3Quote: Listings look more modern and stand out much more. Very effective.

FAQ.title: FAQ
FAQ.a1: Most reels are delivered within hours if content is ready.
FAQ.q2: Is the test reel really free?
FAQ.a2: Yes. Send your listing content and we'll create a test reel for free. No commitment.
FAQ.q3: What is needed to get started?
FAQ.a3: Photos, videos, price, location, or any details that should be included.
FAQ.a4: Designs are available as an add-on alongside reels.
FAQ.a5: Yes. Revisions are included depending on the selected package.
FAQ.a6: Reels show space, movement, and atmosphere much better than static photos, which leads to more attention and interest.

Footer.tagline: More attention for listings — fast and affordable.
